title: Transforms JSON Schema
description: Transforms generated for camera poses compatible with Nerfstudio

camera_model.description: The camera model type (e.g., OPENCV, PINHOLE).

fl_x.description: The focal length on the x axis.

fl_y.description: The focal length on the y axis.

cx.description: The optical center offset on the x axis.

cy.description: The optical center offset on the y axis.

w.description: Resolution width of the RGB images.

h.description: Resolution height of the RGB images.

file_path.description: Relative path to the RGB image.

depth_file_path.description: Relative path to the associated depth map.

transform_matrix.description: A 4x4 matrix representing the camera-to-world transform.
